series_metadata.series_title: Daily .xml warrant file for agencies other than ODJFS.
series_metadata.series_description: .xml files that contain data on warrants presented to the Treasurer of State for payment, and which were originally issued on behalf of agencies other than the Ohio Department of Jobs and Family Services (ODJFS). This file is sent daily from the Treasurer of State to the respective agency through File Transfer Protocol (FTP). The individual warrants that comprise this file are retained separately pursuant to agency series number ACC-73; series authorization number 090-0309.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from date file is sent by FTP
